data.name: 다단계 강화학습을 통한 휴머노이드 전신 배드민턴
로봇이 로봇을 훈련시킨다: 휴머노이드를 위한 자동 실제 세계 정책 적응 및 학습
Active Stereo-Camera Outperforms Multi-Sensor Setup in ACT Imitation Learning for Humanoid Manipulation
DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA
Learning Fine-Grained Bimanual Manipulation with Low-Cost Hardware
OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning

data.description: OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning mentions Learning Fine-Grained Bimanual Manipulation with Low-Cost Hardware.
OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning cites or references Humanoid Whole-Body Badminton via Multi-Stage Reinforcement Learning.

OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning cites or references Active Stereo-Camera Outperforms Multi-Sensor Setup in ACT Imitation Learning for Humanoid Manipulation.
OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning mentions Action Chunking with Transformers (ACT).
OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning mentions Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning cites or references DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA.
OmniH2O: Universal and Dexterous Human-to- Humanoid Whole-Body Teleoperation and Learning cites or references Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids.
